footer.message: A warm and joyful celebration in Sweden.

ourWeddingPage.title: Our Wedding
ourWeddingPage.subtitle: We are happy to celebrate this moment with you and share all practical details in one place.
ourWeddingPage.heroInvitation: Because you have shared in our lives and supported our love, we invite you to witness our 'happily ever after.' On September the 12th, we will stand before our favorite people to say 'I do' at Kaggeholms Slott. Your presence is the greatest gift we could receive, and we can’t wait to share this beautiful new chapter with you.

sections.title: A Celebration Built On Two Cultures
body: Our wedding joins family and friends from France, Sweden and beyond.
We designed this website to make your trip easier and to keep all updates clear.
TODO: Validate final opening wording against the original source copy.

sections.title: Where We Will Meet
body: The celebration takes place in Sweden with events spread over one full wedding weekend.
Exact venue names and maps are shared in dedicated sections below.
Please review travel and accommodation information before booking.

sections.title: What Matters Most To Us
body: We want to keep this weekend warm, simple and deeply human.
Your presence is the greatest gift and we are grateful to share this chapter with you.

accommodationFoodPage.title: Accommodation & Food
accommodationFoodPage.subtitle: All information related to accommodation and meals during the weekend.

sections.title: General Information
body: For guests who would like to continue the festivities, it will be possible to stay overnight at the castle.
It will also be possible to reserve meals linked to your stay. These will also be reserved and paid directly by each guest.
More information about prices, reservations and schedules will be shared later.
If you already know that you would be interested in accommodation on site, please let us know so we can organize this as smoothly as possible.

sections.title: Packages And Prices
body: Accommodation and meals will be organized as part of the wedding but will be paid by each guest.
Friday - Saturday
One night including Friday dinner and Saturday brunch.
Price: approximately 1,000 SEK per person
Saturday - Sunday
One night including Sunday breakfast buffet.
Price: approximately 1,000 SEK per person
Friday - Sunday
Two nights including Friday dinner, Saturday brunch and Sunday breakfast buffet.
Price: approximately 1,800 SEK per person

sections.title: A Full Weekend Together
body: We hope many of you will choose to stay and share this full weekend of celebration with us.

registrationPage.title: Registration
registrationPage.subtitle: Please confirm your attendance through our Google Form.
registrationPage.comingSoonLine1: To register, please complete the Google Form by clicking the button below.
registrationPage.comingSoonLine2: The form opens in a new tab and only takes a few minutes to complete.

travelPage.title: Travel
travelPage.subtitle: How to reach Kaggeholm Castle easily.

sections.title: Travel By Air
body: For travelers coming from abroad, the closest airport is Bromma, around 2 hours from the castle. Then take bus 176/177 toward Ekero Tappstrom, and change at Ekero Centrum to reach Kaggeholm Castle.
From Arlanda to the castle, we recommend taking the bus from Arlanda Terminal 5 to Brommaplan metro station, then changing to bus 309 to Kaggeholm Castle.

sections.title: Travel By Car, Train Or Bus
body: For those traveling by car, parking is available near the castle. A ferry also connects Fittja to Ekero.
For those using public transport, bus 309 runs from Brommaplan or Ekero Centrum to Kaggeholm Slott.

sections.title: Travel By Metro
body: For those traveling by metro, take the metro from T-central to Brommaplan and change to bus 176 to Bromma Tappstrom, then get off at Ekero Centrum and take bus 309 toward Kaggeholm Castle.

programPage.title: Program
programPage.subtitle: The flow of the wedding day.
leadLines: Here are the key moments of the day to celebrate together.
We recommend arriving a little early so you can fully enjoy the ceremony.
programPage.closingLine: Times are provided as guidance and may change slightly.

faqPage.title: Questions And Answers
faqPage.subtitle: All practical answers in one place.

items.question: Where will the ceremony and dinner take place?
answer: The ceremony and dinner will take place at the same location, at the castle.

items.question: Are children welcome at the wedding?
answer: Of course, children are welcome to celebrate with us!
We kindly ask you to keep an eye on your children throughout the day and evening.

items.question: I would like to give a speech. How can I do that?
answer: Please inform our speech coordinator, Dalia, or our toastmaster, X, if you would like to speak.
We recommend around 5 minutes per speech.

items.question: Is there a shopping center nearby if I need to buy something?
answer: Unfortunately, you need to go to central Ekero, but there is a small bistro near the castle.

items.question: Is there a dress code?
answer: We would love elegant attire for the wedding, but the most important thing is that you feel comfortable and fully enjoy this day with us.
Please remember to bring a jacket in case of rain, as the ceremony takes place outdoors.

items.question: When should I confirm my attendance?
answer: You will find the form in the "Registration" section.

items.question: I booked an overnight stay, what should I bring?
answer: Bed linen, towels and a hygiene kit are provided and included in the booking.
Toilets and showers are located in the castle, but are shared with other guests.
You can bring your pajamas, slippers, soap, shampoo, etc.

items.question: Do you have any special wishes regarding gifts?
answer: Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift we could receive.
If you would like to give us something, we would appreciate a contribution to our honeymoon.

rsvpPage.title: RSVP
rsvpPage.subtitle: The full registration form is not connected yet.
rsvpPage.line1: Thank you for your patience while we finalize the external registration workflow.
rsvpPage.line2: For now, this page remains a placeholder and the RSVP button stays visible by design.
rsvpPage.line3: You will receive an update as soon as registration opens.
